products.name: GS Platform
products.descriptor: Integrated robotics hardware, software, and cloud fleet management platform

evidence.snippet:
THE GS PLATFORM
THE GS
PLATFORM
A collection of robotic hardware, software and cloud products that enable users to rapidly progress from concept, to prototype, to operational system.

products.name: MACLUV
products.descriptor: Autonomous UAV system capable of vessel landing at sea

evidence.snippet:
GreenSight’s MACLUV Demonstrates Autonomous Vessel Landing 2025
===============================================================
MACLUV completed real-time tracking and UAV landings at sea during ANTX 2025, advancing autonomous maritime operations.

products.name: UltraBlue avionics
products.descriptor: Avionics hardware component for robotic vehicle integration

evidence.snippet:
Robotic controllers
and sensors hardware
==========================================
An expanding collection of modern hardware components is required to realize our customer’s robotic solutions. Each component comes with the necessary software support in the platform to enable rapid integration. The focus is to provide hardware that accelerates customers through integration challenges and fills gaps in market availability.
UltraBlue avionics

products.name: GeoLake
products.descriptor: Cloud platform for massive geospatial imagery and video dataset management

evidence.snippet:
Image processing tools and pipelines
Sensor data analytics
GeoLake for massive imagery and video datasets

products.name: Quadcopters
products.descriptor: Catalog and custom quadcopter UAV platforms for commercial and defense missions

evidence.snippet:
Robotic hardware and swarm systems
==================================
GreenSight develops and manufactures catalog and fully custom robotic vehicles to help our customers achieve their missions. We sell existing designs directly for customers to deploy for their applications, as well as design and manufacture fully custom units.
Quadcopters

products.name: TurfCloud

evidence.snippet:
TurfCloud Expands Capabilities Through Integration with Syngenta’s Spiio™ Precision Soil Sensor System

unresolved_questions: MACLUV: only mentioned in a news article excerpt on the gs-platform page; no dedicated product page was fetched. Readiness, specs, and classification as fixed-wing vs. multirotor vs. hybrid are unconfirmed.
UltraBlue avionics: appears only as a single bullet item on the gs-platform page; no spec sheet or detail page fetched — readiness and exact function (autopilot, FHSS radio, etc.) unconfirmed.
GeoLake: appears only as a single bullet item on the gs-platform page; no dedicated product/pricing page fetched — readiness unconfirmed.
The /defense page was skipped (class budget exhausted) and likely contains defense-specific product details, NDAA/Blue UAS claims, and further MACLUV context.
Quadcopters, Fixed wing, Hybrids, Underwater, and Ground Vehicles are listed only as vehicle-type categories without named model SKUs; specific model names may exist on skipped pages.

fetch_requests.reason: Skipped page likely contains defense product details, possible NDAA/Blue UAS compliance language, and MACLUV specifics needed to confirm readiness and ndaa/blue_uas fields.
News article about MACLUV's ANTX 2025 demo; would confirm vehicle type, capability details, and help assess readiness for that SKU.
TurfCloud's own subdomain/portal was out-of-scope; fetching it would confirm TurfCloud product features and any compliance claims.
